PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?station ?stationLabel WHERE {
  ?station wdt:P31 /(wdt:P279) * wd:Q25956 .
  {
    ?station wdt:P571 ?date
  } UNION {
    ?station wdt:P580 ?date
  } UNION {
    ?station wdt:P619 ?date
  }
  FILTER(?date <= NOW ())
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?station rdfs:label ?stationLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?stationLabel) = "en")
  }
}
